text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text: // It's the day of the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
/* I'm deciphering the cheers that have reached
the paddock from the stands.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
They're full of anticipation, doubt, passion...
They're pouring all their voices onto the runners.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur's Log
text_block_list.text:
But none of it has any meaning to me. Today, I'm
going to rebuff every single one of those
screaming voices and carve myself into their
minds. */
